office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Dan Griffey faces veteran and technology consultant Jim Pierson and community candidate Shaena Garberich.

candidates.summary: Griffey is an incumbent representative and career firefighter emphasizing fiscal restraint, housing supply, transportation, and first responders.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent representative with career emergency-service experience.

candidates.summary: Pierson is an Army Special Forces veteran and technology consultant focused on affordability, infrastructure, public safety, and effective services.
highlights: Emphasizes veterans, public safety, and effective services [S2]

experience.basis: He brings military and consulting experience but no documented elected record.

candidates.summary: Garberich is a community candidate and former city-council candidate whose dossier establishes no detailed legislative platform.
highlights: Previously ran for Shelton City Council [S1][S2]

experience.basis: She has prior candidacy but no documented elected or institutional record.
